title: Salewa Denali II Dome Tent — 2-Person, 3-Season
short_description: Alpine 3-season dome tent for 2 people. The Salewa Denali II offers 2630 g lightweight, 3000 mm water column and trusted Salewa quality for demanding mountain tours.
long_description: The Salewa Denali II is an alpine 3-season dome tent for two people. With a total weight of just 2630 g and a 3000 mm water column, it is suitable for trekking, mountain and alpine use. The Cactus/Grey colour blends discreetly into nature.
features: 2630 g total weight — lightweight for mountain tours
3000 mm water column — reliable rain protection
buying_angle: Premium alpine tent for trekking and mountain tours. Lightweight (2630 g), 3000 mm water column.
